summary.intent: Fix PR review comments on a pull request for the moltis repo, specifically addressing two issues flagged by Greptile in the openai.rs providers file.
summary.outcome: Both P2 Greptile comments were addressed by editing openai.rs, tests were run, and the fixes were formatted, committed, and pushed to the remote branch.

repo: The moltis repo uses worktrees stored under /Users/penso/.superset/worktrees/moltis/
Providers are implemented as separate crates under crates/providers/src/
LM Studio has dedicated tests that can be run after changes to openai.rs

code.finding: Two valid P2 issues were identified by Greptile and fixed; the file handles OpenAI provider logic and is shared with LM Studio integration

workflow: Greptile is used for automated PR review and flags issues as P2 priority
PR comments are fetched separately for inline vs. top-level reviews via Bash
Format step is run before committing review fixes
